provenance.settings: RHF-CCSD (spatial-orbital t1); SCF conv_tol 1e-11, CCSD conv_tol 1e-10; cart=False (spherical); basis built from vendored data/basis/*.json (BSE), never PySCF's internal library.
provenance.definition: T1 = ||t1||_F / sqrt(N_corr_elec), N_corr_elec = 2 * n_correlated_occupied (Lee & Taylor; PySCF cc.get_t1_diagnostic, the ORCA/CFOUR closed-shell convention).
provenance.tolerances: T1 is amplitude-level; hartree<->ref gate 1e-8 (CCSD amplitudes converged to 1e-10 in both programs).
